title: rhododendron javanicum subsp. moultonii
intro: Rhododendron javanicum subsp. moultonii is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the rhododendron family. It is native to certain regions of Southeast Asia and has been used for its medicinal properties for centuries. The leaves and roots of this plant are known to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and prevent infections. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Rhododendron javanicum subsp. moultonii are made by boiling the leaves and roots in water to create a tea or infusion, which is then consumed to harness its health benefits.
